# Ark Studios

> Ark Studios LLC | We are engaged in software development, sales, and service provision.

## About

Ark Studios is a software development company based in Shibuya, Tokyo. We plan, design, develop, and sell software for smartphones, computers, XR headsets, smartwatches, TV boxes, and more.

- Founded: November 27, 2023
- Location: 2F-C, Shibuya Dogenzaka Tokyu Bldg., 1-10-8 Dogenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo
- Tagline: Selected solutions, an ark to the future.

## Products

- [BitRemote](https://bitremote.app): Remote download task management app for iPhone, iPad, and Mac
